description_long: This object is a modern grave site set on a rectangular stone platform with a combination of light gray and black marble or granite. The main feature is a vertical headstone composed of two slabs: one black and one light gray, with the black slab bearing a cross and visible inscriptions. In front of the headstone is a raised rectangular grave cover, also in black and gray stone, matching the base. Three black cubic blocks, likely serving as candle or flower holders, are positioned on the paved area adjacent to the grave, each topped with a white circular element. The entire grave is surrounded by a paved stone surface, demarcating the burial plot from its surroundings. The design is minimalist and contemporary, with clean lines and a polished finish.
description: A modern grave site with a dual-tone marble headstone, raised grave cover, and three black cubic holders on a paved stone base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the dual-tone headstone, the grave cover, and three cubic holders aligned to the left.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the thickness of the headstone and the full length of the grave cover, with the cubic holders in the background.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the headstone with a cross and inscriptions, the grave cover, and the three cubic holders to the right.
description_view_3: View from the foot of the grave, focusing on the three cubic holders and the length of the grave cover.
